name: Anne Wiggins Brown
abstract: Anne Wiggins Brown (August 9, 1912 – March 13, 2009) was an American lyric soprano for whom George Gershwin rewrote the part of "Bess" into a leading role in the original production of his opera Porgy and Bess in 1935. She was also a radio and concert singer.

about_quotes.speaker: John W. Bubbles
about_quotes.evidence: We had Todd Duncan, he was Porgy. And Ann Wiggins Brown was Bess.
